message:
✨ Fix tile mode layout, font scaling, and tab click toggle (#47)

- Fix tile grid rows by using explicit gridTemplateRows instead of gridAutoRows
- Replace requestAnimationFrame with setTimeout for reliable tile mounting
- Add overflow:hidden on tile grid container
- Scale terminal font size in tile mode based on grid density (1 row→13px, 2→10px, 3→8px, 4+→7px)
- Restore font to 14px when switching back to single view
- Change tile icon from ColumnsIcon to AppsIcon (4-square grid)
- Make tile button always visible (dimmed when no tabs checked)
- Clicking anywhere on tab (except X) toggles checkbox selection

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
